title: Sudden Fear
writer: Lenore J. Coffee, Robert Smith, Edna Sherry
actors: Joan Crawford, Jack Palance, Gloria Grahame
plot: After an ambitious actor insinuates himself into the life of a wealthy middle-aged playwright and marries her, he plots with his mistress to murder her.
awards: Nominated for 4 Oscars. 2 wins & 5 nominations total
